description: Style Note Accesorise your outfit with fabulous bangles from adrika. It will grab attention with its subtle beauty and exquisite designs. Wear it for that special day and get the mood just right with this piece! Product Details Black beaded bangle that has a silver coloured metallic beaded strand and an interlooped design wih an opening that can be stretched to slide the hand through Material and CarePlastic and metallic beaded bracelet Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Size Diameter: 4.5 cm
